title: Conducting a clinical trial for COVID-19 medical devices: List of authorized clinical trials - Canada.ca
content:
## Conducting a clinical trial for COVID-19 medical devices: List of authorized clinical trials
- Conducting a clinical trial
- List of authorized clinical trials
The table below lists the clinical trials authorized by Health Canada for COVID-19-related medical devices. Authorization is done through the Medical Device Regulations or the New Clinical Trials for Medical Devices and Drugs Relating to COVID-19 Regulations , that replaced the Interim order on February 27, 2022.
Health Canada continues to discuss potential clinical trials with a number of sponsors. We will update the list as new trials related to medical devices are authorized.
Trial Name /Protocol #/control #
Authorization holder
Clinicaltrials.gov Link
